'''hahana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zefir|zefir]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zefir|zefir]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hahana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæhænæth|hæhænæth]] || [[word:hæhænæj|hæhænæj]] || [[word:hæhænæsh|hæhænæsh]] || [[word:hæhænæ|hæhænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahahanath|hahahanath]] || [[word:hahahanaj|hahahanaj]] || [[word:hahahanash|hahahanash]] || [[word:hahahana|hahahana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahanath|hahanath]] || [[word:hahanaj|hahanaj]] || [[word:hahanash|hahanash]] || [[word:hahana|hahana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahafnath|hahafnath]] || [[word:hahafnaj|hahafnaj]] || [[word:hahafnash|hahafnash]] || [[word:hahafnaf|hahafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahanatha|hahanatha]] || [[word:hahanaja|hahanaja]] || [[word:hahanasha|hahanasha]] || [[word:hahanaka|hahanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahanath|hahanath]] || [[word:hahanaj|hahanaj]] || [[word:hahanash|hahanash]] || [[word:hahana|hahana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahanathal|hahanathal]] || [[word:hahanajal|hahanajal]] || [[word:hahanashal|hahanashal]] || [[word:hahanakal|hahanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahanathatha|hahanathatha]] || [[word:hahanajaja|hahanajaja]] || [[word:hahanashasha|hahanashasha]] || [[word:hahanaka|hahanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahanathan|hahanathan]] || [[word:hahanajan|hahanajan]] || [[word:hahanashan|hahanashan]] || [[word:hahanakan|hahanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahanathaoro|hahanathaoro]] || [[word:hahanajaoro|hahanajaoro]] || [[word:hahanashaoro|hahanashaoro]] || [[word:hahanakaoro|hahanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
